violations.description: General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Doors and windows open at time for ventilation. Screens not provided.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employees changing gloves and tasks without washing hands.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Storing multiple items in the hand wash sink.
